headline: Engineering executive scaling fintech and payments platforms
title: VP Of Engineering
confidenceNote: LinkedIn, her own LinkedIn announcement, The Org, and executive-directory results consistently identify Snigdha Sinha as VP of Engineering at Early Warning/Paze; Chicago-area location is inferred from public Park Ridge, Illinois profile evidence.
bioMarkdown: VP of Engineering at Early Warning/Paze, focused on scaling fintech and payments engineering organizations. Prior public profile evidence connects her to data-solutions and engineering leadership roles at Adyen and PayPal/Braintree.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile identifies Snigdha Sinha at Early Warning, with University of Michigan background and Chicago-area location.

primary.label: LinkedIn announcement
primary.note: Her post says she started as VP of Engineering at Paze, Early Warning, and is building in payments.

secondary.label: The Org profile
secondary.note: Profile lists her as VP of Engineering at Early Warning and summarizes prior Adyen and PayPal/Braintree leadership roles.

secondary.label: Datanyze Early Warning profile
secondary.note: Company directory result lists Snigdha Sinha as Vice President, Engineering at Early Warning.

headline: Applied AI product and governance leader working on mission-critical enterprise workflows
title: AI Product Director
confidenceNote: The Black Tech Collective profile directly places him at Novartis as Director and AI Use Case Lead, while LinkedIn and Aspen Policy Academy corroborate the same Solomon Abiola identity and AI/governance background; the exact participant title AI Product Director is treated as attendee-provided rather than independently confirmed verbatim.
bioMarkdown: AI product leader at Novartis working on U.S. Commercial AI use cases and enterprise adoption. Former Maryland AI/ML policy and governance leader and AWS research science lead with dual PhDs spanning computer science and translational biomedical sciences.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile describes Solomon Abiola as an AI product leader and builder with dual PhDs and AI systems focus.

primary.label: The Black Tech Collective profile
primary.note: Profile says he serves as Director and AI Use Case Lead at Novartis, driving AI initiatives across U.S. Commercial operations.

secondary.label: Aspen Policy Academy profile
secondary.note: Profile identifies him as an AI/ML policy and governance director for Maryland with prior AWS, EcoMap, Tetra, and AI-health PhD background.

secondary.label: LinkedIn article
secondary.note: Public article summarizes his dual PhD background and AI-in-healthcare expertise.

headline: Founder building AI-native affiliate and SaaS growth infrastructure
title: Founder & CEO
confidenceNote: Public evidence links Son Tung Nguyen to Affitor LLC d/b/a Kyma API and public Son Piaz/Nguyen Tung Son social profiles to founding Affitor, but the name variant means the identity match should be reviewed before participant approval.
bioMarkdown: Founder working on Affitor, an AI-native affiliate network for SaaS companies. Public product materials emphasize agent-friendly workflows, open affiliate-program data, Stripe-native tracking, and SaaS partnership growth.

primary.label: Kyma API terms
primary.note: Terms page names Son Tung Nguyen as DMCA agent for Affitor LLC d/b/a Kyma API at a San Francisco address.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Public profile for Son Piaz says he is the founder of Affitor and describes Affitor LLC as an affiliate marketing platform.

primary.label: Affitor website
primary.note: Company site describes Affitor as an AI-native affiliate network built for SaaS companies and partnerships.

secondary.label: Affitor GitHub organization
secondary.note: GitHub organization describes Affitor as AI-native affiliate marketing for SaaS with agent-first tools and open-source affiliate workflows.

secondary.label: Public Facebook profile/post
secondary.note: Public social profile text for Nguyen Tung Son references Affitor as an affiliate platform he built, supporting the name-variant match.

headline: AI research scientist studying self-improving agents, creative AI, and learning with AI

bioMarkdown: Research Scientist at Sakana AI working on self-improving research agents. Her broader research spans creative AI applications, AI education, multimodal systems, and how people learn with and about AI.

headline: AI founder building reliable agents for search, verification, and scientific co-invention
title: CEO
confidenceNote: Personal site, LinkedIn, MIT CSAIL, Caltech, and Contra all consistently identify Stephan Zheng as founder/CEO of Asari AI in San Francisco with AI-agent and AI Economist research background.
bioMarkdown: Founder and CEO of Asari AI, building AI agents for reliable co-invention through search and rigorous verification. Previously led Salesforce Research's AI Economist work using deep reinforcement learning and multi-agent simulations for economic policy design.

primary.label: Personal website
primary.note: Personal site says he is founder and CEO of Asari AI, building AI agents to co-invent the future, and previously led the AI Economist team.

primary.note: Public profile identifies him as founder and CEO of Asari AI in San Francisco.

secondary.note: MIT event lists Stephan Zheng as founder and CEO of Asari AI and describes work on reliable AI agents, search, and verification.
